visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a white knit bucket hat and a black off-the-shoulder top stands in a warehouse-style supermarket. She holds a large purple box of 'Always Whisper' sanitary pads while smiling and gesturing. Stacks of similar purple boxes surround her, and other shoppers with carts move in the background. (2) The camera zooms in on the product box, showing the 'Always' logo and Taiwanese text details. The woman's hands are visible as she points to the discount information on the packaging. (3) The perspective shifts to show a low stack of boxes on the floor, indicating high demand. The woman gestures toward the depleting stock while speaking animatedly to the camera. (4) The woman returns to the center of the frame, holding the box against her chest. Animated clouds with smiley faces are used to mask the faces of passers-by in the background for privacy. The lighting is bright and industrial.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 大家搶著買. [Variety]: 黑五好康. [Variety]: 好自在液體衛生棉. (2) [Subtitle]: 黑五很多人在拿的好自在液體衛生棉. (3) [Subtitle]: 那它原本是589折了170元. (4) [Subtitle]: 所以現在價格只要419元. (5) [Subtitle]: 幾乎每個女生車上都會有一個. (6) [Subtitle]: 對!這裡面有60路. (7) [Subtitle]: 那每一片的話是6.98就是7塊錢. (8) [Subtitle]: 老實說我沒有用過. (9) [Subtitle]: 妹妹妳覺得好用嗎? (10) [Subtitle]: 喔!我還蠻喜歡的. (11) [Subtitle]: 喔!所以這價格就是有興趣的人可以囤貨. (12) [Subtitle]: 你看!已經變扁扁的. (13) [Subtitle]: 只剩下最下面一層了. (14) [Subtitle]: 但好在每一天都有補貨啦. (15) [Subtitle]: 所以不用擔心買不到.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking, 5 shoppers visible in the background background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white knit bucket hat with an NY logo and a black cold-shoulder blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse aisle filled with stacks of purple product boxes. Behind the main subject, signage for 'BEEF' and 'PORK' sections is visible, along with metal shelving and other shoppers.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice begins speaking with a bright, professional tone, describing a product sale. The speech rate is fast and enthusiastic. In the background, there is a low-intensity ambient room tone characteristic of a large commercial space, mixed with a light, upbeat acoustic guitar and percussion BGM at 120 BPM. (2) As the speaker mentions specific numbers and currency, a subtle digital 'ding' SFX occurs to highlight on-screen text. The vocal remains projected and clear. (3) A second, softer female voice briefly responds off-camera with a positive valence, confirming she likes the product. The BGM remains constant. (4) The primary female voice continues her narration, her pitch rising slightly as she points out the low stock. The ambient store noise remains a steady background layer without masking the primary vocals.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Details -> Social Proof -> Stock Update -> Reassurance
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and promotional vlog intended to inform viewers about a Black Friday discount on 'Always' sanitary pads at Costco. The creator uses high-energy delivery and price-per-unit calculations to emphasize the deal's value, while showing low shelf stock to create a sense of urgency.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, mention of specific pricing and discount details at a specific retailer, and a recommendation based on personal use/social proof.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social-media style video with high information density, utilizing both auditory and visual cues to drive consumer interest.
